_meta.failure_shape: v2.4.0 External-state assertion — failure mode: agent satisfied v2.2.0 4-attestation discipline but asserted against internal proxy (backend response field / SendGrid HTTP 202 ack) instead of external system observable state (SendGrid Activity API event=delivered / inbox arrival)
_meta.originating_failure: heirship-app-v3 transcript: 'backend logs show REQ POST .../invites for all 3 addresses → 201, and the SendGrid hook logged status=202 (accepted) for paul.ingram0322@gmail.com, paul@blackravenadvisors.com, edrobinski@gmail.com.' User pushed back: 'I dont see any invites to either account.' The agent's semantic assertion was on an INTERNAL PROXY (the backend's response field about its own send-attempt OR SendGrid's HTTP 202 ack about its own queue-accept). Neither proves the email reached the inbox.

verification_artifact.observed_state: Confirmation screen shows: 'Invite sent to paul.ingram0322@gmail.com'

bug_description.summary: Family invite email must reach the recipient's inbox after wizard completion
bug_description.gesture_pattern: complete new-matter wizard → click 'Open matter and send invite' → recipient must receive email at their inbox

_corrected_verification_artifact._note: what a correct verification looks like — assertion is against SendGrid Activity API event=delivered, the EXTERNAL system's observable downstream state

observed_state.subject: You're invited to Park Family Trust on Heir Apparent
